Libre during beta · No payments in the app · Android, invite-only

The whole thing, in one app

See it before you say hello.

Browse verified helpers, read the trust signals on every profile, then chat and agree a booking with clear terms — all in the KasaMatch app.

Why KasaMatch

Trust you can see, before you ever say hello.

Matching is only the start. Every profile is checked, every term is agreed, and every conversation stays on the record.

Verified

Real IDs, real people — every profile is checked before it's shown.

Clear

Rates, hours, and duties agreed upfront. Walang gulat.

Safer

In-app chat and booking keep a record you both can see.

Verified, close to home

Meet a few of the pros.

Cleaning, cooking, childcare, elder care, driving — real people, ID- and reference-checked before they ever reach you. Kilala mo na, bago pa pumasok.

For homeowners

Find help you can welcome into your home.

  • Verified profiles before you ever send a message.
  • Agree on rates and duties upfront — no surprises.
  • Chat and book in one place, close to home.

For helpers

Trabaho na may dignidad.

  • Fair terms, agreed before you start.
  • Your profile, your schedule, your choice.
  • A record that protects you too.

KasaMatch is in closed beta. It's free to use, there are no payments in the app, and it's invite-only on Android while we get it right.
